# About Section Template

## Block Structure

1. Pattern interrupt opener
2. Credibility statement
3. Pain recognition list
4. Solution bridge
5. Proof bullets
6. CTA

## Fill Template

`[ICP identifier] dealing with [pain]?`

`I have helped [count] [ICP] achieve [result] in [timeframe].`

`If this sounds familiar, you may be facing:`
- `[pain 1]`
- `[pain 2]`
- `[pain 3]`

`Our approach: [2-3 sentence mechanism summary].`

`Recent outcomes:`
- `[client type A]: [result]`
- `[client type B]: [result]`
- `[client type C]: [result]`

`If relevant, DM "[keyword]" and I will send [next step asset].`
